queries.question: What city did the cheapest flight depart from and what are the coordinates of that place?
queries.sql:
SELECT A.City, Coordinates
FROM Airports A
JOIN Flights F
    ON A.IATA_Code = F.IATA_Departure
ORDER BY F.Price ASC
LIMIT 1;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?city ?coordinates WHERE {
  ?a a :Airports .
  ?f a :Flights .
  ?a p:IATA_Code ?iata_code_l .
  ?f p:IATA_Departure ?iata_departure_r .
  ?a p:City ?city .
  ?a p:Coordinates ?coordinates .
  ?f p:Price ?price_o .
  FILTER(STR(?iata_code_l) = STR(?iata_departure_r))
}
ORDER BY ASC(?price_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: What are the headquarter coordinates of the airline with the most flights and the corresponding city?
queries.sql:
SELECT A.City, Coordinates
FROM Airports A
JOIN Flights F
    ON A.IATA_Code = F.IATA_Departure
JOIN Airlines AL
    ON F.ForeignKey_Airline = AL.Airlines_Id
WHERE
    AL.Airlines_Id = (
        SELECT ForeignKey_Airline
        FROM Flights
        GROUP BY ForeignKey_Airline
        ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
        LIMIT 1
    );
queries.note: override OK (gold-SQL): scalar mode-subquery (airline with most flights); SPARQL nested GROUP BY ORDER D

queries.question: In which city is the headquarters of the airline with the most flights?
queries.sql:
SELECT A.City
FROM Airports A
JOIN Flights F
    ON A.IATA_Code = F.IATA_Departure
JOIN Airlines AL
    ON F.ForeignKey_Airline = AL.Airlines_Id
WHERE
    AL.Airlines_Id = (
        SELECT ForeignKey_Airline
        FROM Flights
        GROUP BY ForeignKey_Airline
        ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
        LIMIT 1
    );
queries.note: override OK (gold-SQL): scalar mode-subquery (airline with most flights) -> city

queries.question: What are the headquarters coordinates of the airline with the most flights?
queries.sql:
SELECT A.Coordinates
FROM Airports A
JOIN Flights F
    ON A.IATA_Code = F.IATA_Departure
JOIN Airlines AL
    ON F.ForeignKey_Airline = AL.Airlines_Id
WHERE
    AL.Airlines_Id = (
        SELECT ForeignKey_Airline
        FROM Flights
        GROUP BY ForeignKey_Airline
        ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
        LIMIT 1
    );
queries.note: override OK (gold-SQL): scalar mode-subquery (airline with most flights) -> coordinates

queries.question: What are the coordinates of the cheapest flight departure?
queries.sql:
SELECT A.Coordinates
FROM Airports A
JOIN Flights F
    ON A.IATA_Code = F.IATA_Departure
ORDER BY F.Price ASC
LIMIT 1;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?coordinates WHERE {
  ?a a :Airports .
  ?f a :Flights .
  ?a p:IATA_Code ?iata_code_l .
  ?f p:IATA_Departure ?iata_departure_r .
  ?a p:Coordinates ?coordinates .
  ?f p:Price ?price_o .
  FILTER(STR(?iata_code_l) = STR(?iata_departure_r))
}
ORDER BY ASC(?price_o)
LIMIT 1

}

  component_2: { SELECT ?city WHERE {
